title: Requirements for Registration as Worker-on-Leave/Vacationing OFW
content:
The requirements for registration as a worker-on-leave or vacationing Overseas Filipino Worker (OFW) are:
1. Valid passport; and
2. Re-entry visa, work permit, or any equivalent document.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
